about.title: My Journey
about.subtitle: A little about me
about.paragraph1: It all began when I discovered I could create something out of nothing with just lines of code. I am currently pursuing a degree in Computer Systems Engineering at the National Technological Institute of Mexico, where every day I reaffirm my passion for transforming ideas into digital solutions.
about.paragraph2: My focus goes beyond code: I specialize in creating web experiences that truly matter. I have built everything from management systems for bakeries to government ticketing platforms, always prioritizing functionality, security, and user experience. My primary stack includes PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, and modern tools to build useful, accessible, and modern solutions.
about.toastMessage: This animation was programmed by me.
